name: Meal Plan Breakdown
query:
SELECT
    g.item AS grocery,
    g.base_uom AS uom,

    SUM(gi.quantity) AS amount_required,

    COALESCE((
        SELECT SUM(b.actual_qty)
        FROM `tabGrocery Bin` b
        WHERE b.grocery = g.name
    ), 0) AS stock_available,

    g.price_per_base_uom AS price_per_unit,

    SUM(gi.quantity) * g.price_per_base_uom AS total_cost

FROM `tabMeal Plan` mp

JOIN `tabMeal Item` mi
    ON mi.parent = mp.name          -- Meal Plan → Meal Item

JOIN `tabMeal` m
    ON m.name = mi.meal             -- Meal Item → Meal

JOIN `tabGrocery Item` gi
    ON gi.parent = m.name           -- Meal → Grocery Item

JOIN `tabGrocery` g
    ON g.name = gi.grocery          -- Grocery Item → Grocery

WHERE mp.name = %(meal_plan)s

GROUP BY g.name
ORDER BY g.item;
